creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to mintsuki from comment #2)

I see.  The changelog is so hard to read, I missed that when I had a look at it.

It's still not very useful as the commits do not tell you what changed for the user or the distribution that ships the port.  A changelog (or release notes notes) is supposed to aid the user in being aware of things that changed.  A list of commits does not fullfil this need very well.
